description: One editable pre-launch roster assigning personas and helper/verifier lanes to adapters.

createdFor.description: Priority slug, route family, or local purpose.

modelRoles.description: Role-to-model policy for orchestration, planning, building, builder subagents, research, synthesis, fallback, and substitution rules. Role references may name a profile lane or a direct adapter/adapterProfile.

rules: The active profile is read once before launch and snapshotted into the run ledger.
Profiles are not hot-swapped during a run.
Every required route lane must resolve to an available adapter before launch.
Missing required verifier adapters produce NEEDS_FOUNDER or degraded non-PASS state, never PASS.
Model roles are dispatch contracts. A lane may not silently substitute one configured role for another; degraded modes must follow modelRoles.fallbackPolicy and modelRoles.substitutionPolicy.
